simple_types.name: sfBlendEquation
simple_types.code:
type sfBlendEquation is
  (sfBlendEquationAdd,
   sfBlendEquationSubtract,
   sfBlendEquationReverseSubtract,
   sfBlendEquationMin,
   sfBlendEquationMax
  );

simple_types.name: sfBlendFactor
simple_types.code:
type sfBlendFactor is
  (sfBlendFactorZero,
   sfBlendFactorOne,
   sfBlendFactorSrcColor,
   sfBlendFactorOneMinusSrcColor,
   sfBlendFactorDstColor,
   sfBlendFactorOneMinusDstColor,
   sfBlendFactorSrcAlpha,
   sfBlendFactorOneMinusSrcAlpha,
   sfBlendFactorDstAlpha,
   sfBlendFactorOneMinusDstAlpha
  );

record_types.name: sfBlendMode

fields.name: colorSrcFactor
fields.description: /< Source blending factor for the color channels

fields.name: colorDstFactor
fields.description: /< Destination blending factor for the color channels

fields.name: colorEquation
fields.description: /< Blending equation for the color channels

fields.name: alphaSrcFactor
fields.description: /< Source blending factor for the alpha channel

fields.name: alphaDstFactor
fields.description: /< Destination blending factor for the alpha channel

fields.name: alphaEquation
fields.description: /< Blending equation for the alpha channel
